19.reason: Insufficient memory: only one integer allocated, but multiple operands will be stored, causing out-of-bounds writes.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Insufficient memory: only one integer allocated, but multiple operands will be stored, causing out-of-bounds writes.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Allocates only one integer, but the program stores many numbers, causing buffer overflow and undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Allocates memory for only one integer. When multiple numbers are parsed, this leads to buffer overflow and undefined behavior. Should allocate a larger array, e.g., malloc(sizeof(int) * 100).]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Allocates memory for only one integer. When multiple numbers are parsed, this causes buffer overflow and undefined behavior. Should allocate a larger array, e.g., malloc(sizeof(int) * 100).]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Insufficient memory allocation: only space for one integer, but multiple numbers are stored in p[]]
